(1 comment)

Sorry for not looking at this sooner. This slipped my mind. I think I have a patch for a minor refactor that would ensure mirror_end is always proper initialized. I could push it to this patch or create a new one.

Patch Set 1:

I'm fine to abandon this patch if you have a better one.

Patch Set 1:

Moving "uint64_t mirror_end = LUSTRE_EOF;" to the beginning of the function rather than inside the while statement might also work, since that avoids mirror_end getting reset on each pass of the loop.

parents.subject: LU-16221 build: modify kmodtool for rhel9

commit.subject: LU-16813 utils: initialize mirror_end var
commit.message:
LU-16813 utils: initialize mirror_end var

initialize mirror_end variable in in llapi_mirror_resync_many(),
otherwise lfs mirror resync may fail.

Fixes: b0297a1056 ("LU-16518 lnet: fix clang build errors")
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ibffff518f7d3a6b6e91a70ce5b01b323b660bd04
